name: %meta.name%
author: Jirka Horák
_io: Capability labels surface in admin UIs and logs, not in the viewer chrome. Only name/description/longDescription resolve %key% locale refs (LOCALIZABLE_META_KEYS), so these stay plain — same as modules/recorder.
_scoreSchema: The scoring vocabulary offered in the toolbar. `labels` maps a label id to the numeric value a sink records; order is preserved. `scoreKey` names the quantity being scored. Deployment-tunable via ENV.plugins.slide-scoring.
